recommendations.title: Dead of Night
recommendations.overview: An architect, visiting an English country house, realizes the other guests are familiar from his recurring nightmare. When they share their tales of the supernatural, he is filled with a growing dread.
recommendations.director: Charles Crichton, Alberto Cavalcanti, Robert Hamer, Basil Dearden

recommendations.title: Victim
recommendations.overview: A web of blackmail and murder attracts the attention of a barrister with a seemingly idyllic life, threatening to derail his career on the path of success.

recommendations.title: Henry V
recommendations.overview: In 1415, in the midst of the Hundred Years' War, the young King Henry V of England embarks on the conquest of France.

recommendations.title: The League of Gentlemen
recommendations.overview: Involuntarily-retired Colonel Hyde recruits seven other dissatisfied ex-servicemen for a special project. Each of the men has a skeleton in the cupboard, is short of money, and is a service-trained expert in his field. The job is a bank robbery, and

recommendations.title: Happily N'Ever After 2
recommendations.overview: Fairy tales collide when Mambo and Munk tip the scales of good and evil once again.

recommendations.title: Hacksaw Ridge
recommendations.overview: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.

recommendations.title: Lawrence of Arabia
recommendations.overview: During World War I, English officer Thomas Edward 'T.E.' Lawrence sets out to unite and lead the diverse, often warring, Arab tribes to fight the Turks.

recommendations.title: Gettysburg
recommendations.overview: In the summer of 1863, General Robert E. Lee leads the Confederate Army of Northern Virginia into Gettysburg, Pennsylvania with the goal of marching through to Washington, D.C. The Union Army of the Potomac, under the command of General George G. Mea

recommendations.title: The Prince and the Showgirl
recommendations.overview: An American showgirl becomes entangled in political intrigue when the Prince Regent of a foreign country attempts to seduce her.

recommendations.title: Kesari
recommendations.overview: In 1897, an army of 21 Sikhs battles 10,000 Afghans to prevent the Saragarhi Fort from being taken down.
